word: G5003 - ταλαιπωρέω - talaipōréō - tal-ahee-po-reh'-o - Be afflicted

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to toil heavily, to endure labors and hardships; to be afflicted; to feel afflicted and miserable
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5005; to be wretched, that is, realize one’s own misery: - be afflicted.
